title: Thunderbird 151.0.1 (64 Bit) Windows 10; an error occurred when writing to the calendar
creator: bill58
content:
Hello, I have six calendars: five are hosted by one provider, Runbox.com, via SabreDAV, and one is hosted by a different provider, Apple iCloud Calendar. I am periodically seeing the error shown below on multiple calendars during automatic sync.

I have saved a two-day event history from the error console and can provide it on request, along with any other troubleshooting information that may be helpful.

I am technical by nature, but my programming experience was primarily with mainframes rather than personal computers. Could someone kindly help me troubleshoot this ongoing issue?

Thanks in advance.

Bill

10:34:53.958 An error occurred when writing to the calendar House! Please see below for more information. Error code: MODIFICATION_FAILED. Description: If you’re seeing this message after snoozing or dismissing a reminder and this is for a calendar you do not want to add or edit events for, you can mark this calendar as read-only to avoid such experience in future.
